name: meda-marketing
title: Meda Marketing
description: Install Meda marketing wrappers for callouts, contact sections, and lead magnets.

files.content:
export {
  MarketingCallout as MedaMarketingCallout,
  MarketingContact as MedaMarketingContact,
  MarketingCtaList as MedaMarketingCtaList,
  MarketingLeadMagnet as MedaMarketingLeadMagnet,
} from '@medalsocial/meda/marketing'
export type {
  MarketingCalloutProps,
  MarketingContactPerson,
  MarketingContactProps,
  MarketingCta,
  MarketingCtaListProps,
  MarketingLeadMagnetProps,
  MarketingOffice,
} from '@medalsocial/meda/marketing'
